---
applyTo: "**/*"
---

# run-ktlint

Run ktlint for Kotlin code formatting. Use when user asks to run ktlint or requests a Kotlin formatting check.

Run `./gradlew ktlintCheck` in the project directory.
After running ktlint, list formatting violations grouped by file.
Suggest running `./gradlew ktlintFormat` to auto-fix issues.
